headline: Turkey Data Center Market Investment Analysis Report 2026-2031 Featuring COMnet Solutions, DataCasa, Equinix, NGN, PenDC, Radore, Sadece Hosting, Sparkle, Telehouse, Turk Telekom, Turkcell, Vodafone
summary: The Turkey Data Center Market is poised for significant growth, with a projection to escalate from USD 715 Million in 2025 to USD 1.79 Billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 16.56%. Key insights reveal Istanbul as a central data hub with 21 active centers and two more planned. The market thrives on the country's Renewable Energy 2035 Strategy focusing on wind and solar energy. Global operators like DAMAC Digital and Khazna Data Centers established footholds in 2024 to capture burgeoning demand. Prospecti

headline: South Africa Data Center Market Investment & Growth aNALYSIS Report 2026-2031 Featuring Key DC Investors - Africa Data Centres, Digital Parks, Equinix, Microsoft, NTT, Open Access, Teraco, Vantage
summary: The South Africa Data Center Market is set to grow from USD 2.55 billion in 2025 to USD 5.28 billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 12.90%. Key growth drivers include significant investment in AI and blockchain by the South African government, particularly in partnerships with nine universities. Johannesburg emerges as a central hub, witnessing rapid expansion in data center infrastructure. The sector faces challenges in electricity supply due to increased demand, leading firms to adopt renewable energy
